mapper.sql: id, phone, countryCode, is_use, code, `type`, time_created, ip_address, is_send
mapper.insert:
insert into bas_send_sms
id,
phone,
countryCode,
is_use,
code,
`type`,
time_created,
ip_address,
is_send,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{countrycode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isUse,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{code,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{type,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{timeCreated,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{ipAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isSend,jdbcType=TINYINT},
mapper.update:
update bas_send_sms
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
countryCode = #{countrycode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_use = #{isUse,jdbcType=TINYINT},
code = #{code,jdbcType=INTEGER},
`type` = #{type,jdbcType=TINYINT},
time_created = #{timeCreated,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ip_address = #{ipAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_send = #{isSend,jdbcType=TINYINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update bas_send_sms set phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, countryCode = #{countrycode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_use = #{isUse,jdbcType=TINYINT}, code = #{code,jdbcType=INTEGER}, `type` = #{type,jdbcType=TINYINT}, time_created = #{timeCreated,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ip_address = #{ipAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_send = #{isSend,jdbcType=TINYINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
